name: C_poseblend_full
description: Evaluate full pose blend sampled at multiple times.

test.command:
[[result=0,stdout="^time 0.000
weight=0.000
joint root 0.000 0.000 0.000
joint spine 0.000 1.000 0.000
joint hand 1.000 1.000 0.000
time 0.500
weight=0.500
joint root 0.000 0.000 0.000
joint spine 0.000 1.500 0.000
joint hand 2.000 1.500 0.000
time 1.000
weight=1.000
joint root 0.000 0.000 0.000
joint spine 0.000 2.000 0.000
joint hand 3.000 2.000 0.000
?$"]]--fade full.pose all
